title: hiPSC-iAstro SOX9 NFIB Induction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dcnt6","text":"Direct induction of astrocytes from hiPSCs using transcription factor induction","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"orotn","text":"1. Doxycycline: 25 mg/mL dissolved in water (10000x stock). Sterilize with a 0.22 μm filter and store at -20°C. Protect from light.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cpd2m","text":"2. CNTF: Reconstitute at 10 μg/ml in sterile 10 mM sodium phosphate containing 0.1% BSA. Aliquot and store at -20°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6aoyv","text":"3. bFGF: Reconstitute at 1 mg/ml in sterile 5mM Tris, pH 7.6 containing 0.1% BSA. Aliquot and store at -20°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uxrax","text":"4. BMP4: Reconstitute at 10 μg/ml in sterile 4 mM HCl containing 0.1% BSA. Aliquot and store at -20°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dtbai","text":"5. dbcAMP: Reconstitute at 100 mg/ml in sterile water. Aliquot and store at -20°C. Protect from light.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b2cxe","text":"6. N-acetyl-cysteine: Reconstitute at 50 mg/ml in sterile water. Aliquot and store at -20°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vlark","text":"7. Heparin-binding EGF-like growth factor: Reconstitute at 50 μg/ml in sterile PBS containing 0.1% BSA. Aliquot and store at -20°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Expansion Medium: DMEM/F-12 10% FBS 1% N2 supplement 1% Glutamax
FGF Medium: Neurobasal 2% B27 supplement 1% NEAA 1% Glutamax 1% FBS 8 ng/ml FGF 5 ng/ml CNTF 10 ng/ml BMP4

Maturation Medium: 1:1 DMEM/F-12 and Neurobasal 1% N2 1% Sodium Pyruvate 1% Glutamax 5 μg/ml N-acetyl-cysteine 5 ng/ml heparin-binding EGF-like growth factor 10 ng/ml CNTF 10 ng/ml BMP4 500 μg/ml dbcAMP
Day -1 Dissociate hiPSC with Accutase and incubate 5x10^5^ cells with virus for 1 h.
Seed in Matrigel-coated 6-well plates with StemFlex containing 10 μM Rock inhibitor
Spinfect with Sox9 and NfiB virus for 1h at 1000g
Day 0 Aspirate medium and add 2 ml of fresh StemFlex containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline per well.
Days 1 and 2 Aspirate medium and add 2 ml of Expansion Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline and pertinent antibiotics (for whatever viruses you used).
Day 3 Aspirate medium and add 2 ml of 3/4 of Expansion Medium and 1/4 of FGF Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline per well.
Day 4 Aspirate medium and add 2 ml of 1/2 of Expansion Medium and FGF Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline per well.
Day 5 Aspirate medium and add 2 ml of 1/4 of Expansion Medium and 3/4 of FGF Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline per well.
Day 6 Aspirate medium and add 2 ml of FGF Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline.
Day 7 Dissociate cells with Accutase and pellet at 400g for 5 min.
Replate cells in Matrigel-coated coverslips, petri dishes or wells according to desired output.
Day 8 Use the necessary amount of FGF Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline.
Aspirate medium and add 1/4 FGF Medium and 3/4 Maturation Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline.
Day 10 Aspirate half of the medium and add the same amount of Maturation Medium containing 2.5 μg/ml of Doxycycline.
From here, change half of the medium every 2-3 days.
creator: Kristen Brennand
